descriptionHtml:
Beneteau Oceanis 51.1 for sale 2023 | 5 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

If you are searching for a modern, spacious cruiser, the Beneteau Oceanis 51.1 for sale 2023 could be a strong choice to consider. Having benefited from careful use and regular maintenance, the Oceanis 51.1 combines practical layout, contemporary comfort, and reliable performance, making her suitable for family sailing and group holidays.

Below are the main specifications and features, presented in a list form for easy reference:

General Information

  • Model: Beneteau Oceanis 51.1
  • Year of Build: 2023
  • Availability: End of 2024 season
  • Length Overall (LOA): 15.94 m
  • Beam: 4.8 m
  • Draft: 2.05 m
  • Displacement: Not specified
  • Fuel Tank: 400 litres
  • Water Tank: 770 litres
  • Engine: Yanmar 110hp, 800 hours
  • Cabins: 5
  • Heads (Bathrooms): 3

Sails & Deck Equipment

  • Furling Mainsail (2023)
  • Roller Genoa (2023)
  • Bimini
  • Sprayhood
  • Electric Anchor Windlass
  • Bathing Ladder
  • Deck Shower

Navigation & Electronics

  • Full Set of Instruments
  • GPS Plotter
  • Autopilot (Raymarine)
  • VHF Radio
  • Sound System: Radio, Bluetooth/Aux, speakers in salon and cockpit

Comfort & Interior Features

  • Air Conditioning
  • Electric Fridge
  • Freshwater System
  • Spacious Saloon
  • Generously sized cabins (5)
  • Three bathrooms (heads)

Power & Utilities

  • Generator: Fischer Panda 8.000 KWA (688 hours)
  • Steering Wheels: 2
  • Bowthruster

Tender & Mooring Equipment

  • Dinghy
  • Outboard
  • Mooring Lines
  • Fenders

Other Features

  • Radio/CD Player
  • Full navigation instruments
  • Mainsail and furling genoa
  • Outboard with dinghy

This Beneteau Oceanis 51.1 for sale 2023 is presented in good condition, ready for her next owner. She has a history of regular care, is well-equipped for both comfort and performance, and offers a realistic opportunity for anyone seeking a newer, well-maintained Beneteau yacht. For further information or to arrange a viewing, please get in touch.
